Title: Build Item

baseItemPlaceholder.title: Select a Base Item
baseItemPlaceholder.description: Choose an item from the list on the left to begin building.

Effects.ManageEffectsHint: View, create, and edit the active effects applied by the base item and its modifications.
Effects.InnateLockedHint: This is an innate effect of the item and cannot be deleted, but it can be overridden.
Effects.SelectIconTooltip: Select an icon for this effect
Effects.AttributeKeyPlaceholder: Select a property to modify from the groups below.
Effects.SelectDerivedValueTooltip: Select a property from the base item to derive this value from.
Effects.SelectDerivedValueLabel: Select a property from the Base Item
Effects.SelectAttributeKeyFirst: Please select a property/attribute key first before saving.

BuildQueueEmptyDesc: Use the 'Builder' tab to design an item, then click 'Add to Queue' to send it here.
LogicMemoryPenaltyCheckbox: Check if Logic is 1-4 and memory check is needed
MentalLimitApplied: Mental Limit is applied to this test.
CriticalGlitchPartsDestroyed: Critical glitch! The parts were destroyed and the builder queue has been cleared.
RepairHealedComplete: Vehicle successfully repaired and fully healed.
RepairHealedHits: Vehicle repaired! Recovered {hits} boxes of damage. Remaining damage: {damage}.
SuccessModInstalledDesc: Click the button below to consume the item from inventory and install it on the vehicle.
BuildSuccessDetails: The build/modification took {rolls} rolls, achieving a total of {hits} hits (Threshold: {threshold}).
ErrorModNotAvailable: The modification {name} is not in the factory or purchasing actor's inventory.

Errors.SlotLimitExceeded: Not enough slots available in category "{category}" (Max: {max}, Total: {total}).
Errors.InstallationRejectedLimit: Installation of "{name}" rejected: Slot limit for category "{category}" exceeded (Max: {max}, Total: {total}).

AllModsInStockOrBasket: All modifications are already in stock or in the basket
SomeModsNotInStock: Some modifications are not in stock
NoDamageToRepair: There is no physical damage on this vehicle to repair.
